ChangeRequest.name: Non_financial_asset_id and non_financial_liability_id to be deleted from the input layer
ChangeRequest.comment:
### Overview
The table Non financial asset and non financial liability are at aggregated level therefore they must not have an identifier.
### Contact person
@Arianna.Nuvoli
### Description of change request
Delete Non_financial_asset_id and non_financial_liability_id from all the input layer models.
### Summary of impacted LDM objects/attributes
None
### Forward Engineering considerations
The change will impact only the input layer.
### Before closing checklist
- [ ] Assignee for review - [ ] Assignee to close - [ ] Any other actions to be taken
